tool.name: tripadvisor_scrape_reviews
tool.description: Scrape reviews for a hotel, restaurant, or attraction on TripAdvisor. Returns up to 15 reviews with reviewer name, rating, title, text, date, and trip type.

parameters.name: place_url
parameters.description: Full TripAdvisor URL of the place to scrape reviews from (e.g. 'https://www.tripadvisor.com/Hotel_Review-g187147-d...')
